hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.py$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'print('; then echo 'Warning: print() statements should be replaced with logging' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "pyproject.toml" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; if command -v pip-audit >/dev/null 2>&1; then pip-audit; elif command -v safety >/dev/null 2>&1; then safety check; else echo 'No security audit tool found. Install safety or pip-audit'; fi; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.py$ ]]; then make lint-file FILE="$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.py$ ]]; then RESULT=$(make typecheck-file FILE="$FILE" 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "Type check issues: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.py$ && "$FILE" != *"test_"* && "$FILE" != *"_test.py" && "$FILE" != *"/tests/"* ]]; then BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" .py); for TEST_DIR in backend/tests backend/listings/tests backend/users/tests; do TEST_FILE="$TEST_DIR/test_$BASENAME.py"; if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running $TEST_FILE..."; cd backend && uv run python -m pytest "../$TEST_FILE" -v; cd -; break; fi; done; fi
CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$'); if [[ -n "$CHANGED" ]]; then echo 'Linting changed Python files...'; make lint 2>&1 || true; fi
CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR 2>/dev/null | grep '\.py$'); if [[ -n "$CHANGED" ]]; then echo 'Type checking changed files...'; make typecheck 2>&1 || true; fi
